name: Morgana King
abstract: Maria Grazia Morgana Messina (June 4, 1930 – March 22, 2018), better known as Morgana King, was an American jazz singer and actress. She began a professional singing career at sixteen years old.

about_quotes.speaker: Bill Mays
about_quotes.evidence: Another contrast I did an album for Morgana King called “Simply Eloquent”... I did all the charts and did a mock-up... and sent her material, and she learned it and came to the date.
about_quotes.doc_title: Bill Mays interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, December 5, 2025

about_quotes.speaker: Marty Napoleon
about_quotes.evidence: So I would give her a list of names and it went along pretty good until one time when he had already hired Buster Bailey on clarinet and I had recommended guys like Sammy Most, Tony Scott, Gerry Mulligan, Morgana King
about_quotes.doc_title: Marty Napoleon interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York, New York, January 16, 1999

about_quotes.speaker: Dan Wall and Adam Nussbaum
about_quotes.evidence: Wes Montgomery was there, Morgana King, Milt was there, Billy Taylor, and Dizzy was there.
about_quotes.doc_title: Dan Wall and Adam Nussbaum interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, April 19, 2001
